name: Brian Fitzpatrick
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $2,412,780 for Brian Fitzpatrick in U.S. House, PA-01. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby. Additional primary-source statements and voting records should continue to be incorporated over time.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $2,412,780.
